sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42532" key="e)rismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42532.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔρις</ref></xr>, Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0062.tlg022:28:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
